overall.description: Static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront, featuring towering industrial skyscrapers with smokestacks, a prominent red bridge structure, and floating shanty docks along the shoreline. Bright midday sunlight illuminates the scene with vivid colors and clear blue skies. High-quality game engine footage reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial waterfront with floating dock settlements

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from an elevated position across the water

entered.detail: large red steel bridge structure spanning across the left side of the frame with industrial piping
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with mixed materials including glass and steel, featuring smokestacks emitting white steam
collection of colorful makeshift structures and boats clustered along the right shoreline with teal and red rooftops
calm murky green water filling the foreground and middle ground of the scene
tall buildings with distinctive teal-colored glass facades on the right side of the skyline

segments.scene_description: A static, wide panoramic view captures a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront city under bright midday sun. The foreground features calm greenish water, while the background displays a dense industrial skyline with towering skyscrapers, smokestacks, and a prominent red bridge on the left. Colorful floating shanty docks line the right shore, creating a contrast between high-tech architecture and makeshift settlements. The camera remains stationary throughout, observing the atmospheric details of the game engine environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront that emphasizes the stark contrast between industrial grandeur and makeshift urban decay. It begins by capturing the calm, greenish waters of the foreground, which lead the eye toward a dense skyline of towering skyscrapers and smoking industrial stacks. As the gaze shifts across the horizon, the scene highlights a prominent red bridge anchoring the left side of the frame. The perspective then expands to the right, revealing colorful floating shanty docks that cling to the shoreline beneath a bright midday sun and clear blue skies.
